message:
fix: pre-validate command binary in tmux session creation

Add validateCommandBinary() that checks the binary exists before creating
the tmux session, giving an instant deterministic error instead of relying
on timing-based health checks. Only checks absolute paths.

Cherry-picked from PR #2486. Fixes #2451.

Co-authored-by: Chris Deal <DreadPirateRobertz@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
